name: Fix api.ts:157 - Use template literal instead of string concatenation
description: Biome error in src/lib/youtube/api.ts line 157: 'UU' + channelId.slice(2) should use template literal instead. Change to: `UU${channelId.slice(2)}`. Error: lint/style/useTemplate - Template literals are preferred over string concatenation.
result: Changed string concatenation to template literal at api.ts:157. Also fixed forEach callback return value at line 26.

name: Fix auth.ts:21 - Use optional chaining
description: Biome suggestion in src/auth.ts line 21: 'if (session.user && session.user.email)' should use optional chaining. Change to: 'if (session.user?.email)'. Error: lint/complexity/useOptionalChain.

name: Fix auth.ts - Remove non-null assertions (!)
description: Biome errors in src/auth.ts lines 7, 8, 44, 45: Non-null assertions like process.env.AUTH_GOOGLE_ID! are forbidden. Files: line 7 (clientId), line 8 (clientSecret), line 44 (client_id in fetch body), line 45 (client_secret in fetch body). Fix: Use type guard or assertion: const clientId = process.env.AUTH_GOOGLE_ID; if (!clientId) throw new Error('Missing AUTH_GOOGLE_ID'); and use clientId variable. Error: lint/style/noNonNullAssertion.
result: Replaced 4 non-null assertions with null-check guard variables (authGoogleId, authGoogleSecret) at module level. Throws descriptive errors if env vars are missing.

name: add vitest/config and vite-tsconfig-paths to Docker container
description: vitest/config is missing from global node_modules in container. vite-tsconfig-paths needs to be accessible. Fix so vitest can run in container.
